---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: [enhancement, triage]
---

## Problem
What user / operator pain are we solving?

## Proposal
Concrete description of the change, including any API or schema impact.

## Alternatives considered
What else did you weigh, and why is this proposal better?

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Behavior is documented in `docs/`.
- [ ] Tests cover the happy path and at least one failure mode.
- [ ] Security implications considered.

## Additional context
Sketches, links, references.
